dimensions.criterion: Exactly one playbook loaded; output matches its template; no merging/pre-reading.
Every non-trivial claim tagged EXPLICIT/INFERENCE/ASSUMPTION; tag summary present.
No currency/rates/prices; cost/budget/vendor expressed in FTE-months with disclaimer.
Topic schema fully applied (7 risk categories / opt-exp-pess bands / KR shape / RACI etc.).
Constitution v6.0.0 + script-first; phase separation; single brand; no client PII.
Recommendations are concrete, tagged, and tied to evidence.

pass_rule: No dimension below its fail_if_below and weighted score >= 0.85
